mapper.sql: id, post_id, user_id, parent_reply_id, content, status, created_at, updated_at

SELECT r.id, r.post_id, r.user_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.nickname, ''), u.username) AS author_name, u.avatar AS author_avatar, u.role AS author_role, r.parent_reply_id, COALESCE(NULLIF(pu.nickname, ''), pu.username) AS parent_author_name, CASE WHEN pr.id IS NULL THEN NULL WHEN length(pr.content) > 80 THEN substring(pr.content from 1 for 80) || '...' ELSE pr.content END AS parent_content_preview, r.content, r.status, r.created_at, r.updated_at FROM replies r JOIN users u ON u.id = r.user_id JOIN posts p ON p.id = r.post_id LEFT JOIN replies pr ON pr.id = r.parent_reply_id LEFT JOIN users pu ON pu.id = pr.user_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO replies (post_id, user_id, parent_reply_id, content, status) VALUES (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{parentReplyId}, #{content}, COALESCE(#{status}, 1))
mapper.update: UPDATE replies SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
